text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Mega Fan Fest rolls around, Symboli
Rudolf leads the event with her usual
self-confidence, but her performance is marred by
uncharacteristic oversights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she doesn't let that faze her as she takes her
place in the exhibition race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Symboli Rudolf steps up to the starting line,
the crowd gets ready for a race worthy of the
Emperor—but her showing falls far short of their
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a long time after, the stands are filled with
muttering about her lackluster performance.
